entities.boy: a boy holding an empty pet carrier
entities.poster: a pet adoption poster on the wall

scenes.title: The Vet Waiting Room
scenes.background_prompt: A veterinary clinic waiting room with plastic chairs along the wall, pet posters, a reception desk with a bell, and a tiled floor. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A veterinary clinic waiting room with bright fluorescent lighting. A boy of about ten in a gray sweatshirt and sneakers sits slumped in a blue plastic chair along the wall, an empty pet carrier with its door hanging open resting on the chair beside him. The carrier has a small blanket inside but nothing else. The boy stares at the floor with red-rimmed eyes, his lower lip trembling, both hands gripping the edge of the carrier. On the wall above him, a colorful poster shows smiling puppies and kittens with the text 'Give a pet a forever home.' A reception desk with a small bell and a computer monitor is visible to the right. The tiled floor is spotlessly clean. Other plastic chairs along the wall are empty.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place boy slumped in a blue plastic chair along the wall, staring at the floor with red-rimmed eyes, lower lip trembling, both hands gripping the edge of an empty pet carrier on the chair beside him.
